120363423605030782@g.us.text: Hi guys, Anychance knowing how much for a Van will cost to take 7x people to Everland?

Everland admission tickets and Q-Pass options can be booked online, but visiting with COZE makes the entire day much easier, more comfortable, and more flexible.

🚐 Private door-to-door transportation
We pick you up directly from your accommodation and take you comfortably to Everland. There is no need to manage multiple subway transfers, public buses, or fixed shuttle schedules.


👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Ideal for families with children or elderly guests
We can prepare child seats, strollers, or a wheelchair in advance when requested. Departure and return times can also be adjusted according to your family’s pace and condition.


🛍️ Convenient storage for your belongings
Shopping bags, extra clothes, strollers, and other personal items can be safely kept in the vehicle, allowing you to enjoy the park more freely.


🌙 A stress-free return after the evening shows
You can stay for the night parade, fireworks, or seasonal events without worrying about the last shuttle bus, crowded public transportation, or finding a taxi afterward.

🎟️ Honest guidance for ticket bookings
We can help check possible discounts for standard admission tickets. For Q-Pass tickets, however, there is usually no additional discount available through us, so we may recommend booking directly through an online platform such as Trip.com.

✨ More than just transportation
We can also assist with meal recommendations, suggested attraction routes, family-friendly planning, nearby sightseeing options, and a schedule tailored to your travel style.

With COZE, your Everland experience becomes comfortable from the moment you leave your accommodation until the moment you return 💛

Gaya, Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0

🎢 Everland is included as part of our private tour package. The tour lasts 10 hours and is KRW 500,000 in total.

Thank you for your understanding, and please let us know if you would like to arrange the tour. We would be happy to help!

Ricky, Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0

🏡 COZE BS 맞춤형 숙소 매뉴얼 (KO)
안녕하세요! COZE Hospitality 3.0 게스트 케어팀입니다 👋 세검정의 평온한 산 전망 하우스에 오신 것을 환영합니다 🌿
편안한 투숙을 위한 필수 안내를 확인해 주세요.

📌 숙소 필수정보
주소
 서울시 종로구 세검정로 227-5
대문 열쇠함 비밀번호 0 8 0 5 (사용 후 열쇠는 반드시 열쇠함에 다시 넣어주세요)
객실 도어 코드 — 체크인 날짜(YYMMDD) + * 예: 2025년 5월 10일 → 250510* (체류 내내 동일)

Wi-Fi 네트워크

1F ID KT_GIGA_7FE8 PW 57fj23ee33 

3F ID JOYHASLA_BS PW joyjoyjoy

🚗 주차

현대 스타리아 크기까지 1대 주차 가능
후면주차 권장
출차 시 좌측으로 진출 뒤 후진하여 공로 진입

추가 주차가 필요하면 하루 전 알려주시면 인근 유료주차장 등록을 도와드립니다(최대 3-4대 가능) 

대당 종일 주차 2만원(*원래 3만원인데 저희가 1만원 지원드립니다. 주차비는 체크아웃 시 저희 팀에 직접 지불하시면 되세요) 

유료주차장 / 홍지 주차장 (숙소에서 도보 2분)
서울시 종로구 홍지문길 2

https://naver.me/FQyi60EA 

🌿 Horizon Spa ‘SUNRISE’ (ROOFTOP) — 먼저 읽어주세요

⚠️ 안전한 사용은 게스트의 책임입니다.

🔥 핀란드 사우나 — 사용 방법

게스트 스마트폰으로
Diooist 앱을 엽니다.
Power ON을 탭합니다.
우측 하단 컨트롤 버튼을 탭합니다.
목표 온도와 가동 시간을 설정합니다.권장 온도: 어린이 60 °C · 성인 90 °C

사우나 좌측 컨트롤 패널로
Power ON 버튼을 누릅니다.
우측 상단 Settings를 탭합니다.
Target에서 온도와 시간을 입력합니다.

에티켓 & 안전 수칙
예열 1시간 이상(목표 80–90 °C).
타월 위에 앉거나 눕기; 땀은 여분 타월로 닦기.
충분한 수분 섭취; 음주/과식 금지.
1회 15분 이내; 라운드 사이 5–10분 쿨다운.
돌에는 라들 소량만 물을 끼얹기 — 과다 시 히터 손상.
어린이는 보호자 동반 필수, 60–70 °C, 5분 이내.
수면 금지; 안전을 위해 문을 잠그지 말고 살짝 열어두세요.
종료 후 히터 전원 OFF, 문을 살짝 열어 건조.

썬베드 & 온열담요
호라이즌 스파 썬베드에 전기 온열담요 2조가 제공됩니다.
한겨울에도 따뜻하게 스파를 즐길 수 있으며, 담요는 젖지 않게 사용하고 사용 후 전원 OFF해 주세요.

🛀 자쿠지 — 안전 안내
먼저 샤워하여 수질 유지.
성인 최대 4명(또는 아동 6명).
1회 약 20분 이내, 세션 간 휴식.
로션/오일 금지.
아동·노약자 상시 감독; 해당 인원은 수온 38 °C 이하 유지.
임신 중, 졸림 유발 약 복용, 심장 질환이 있으면 이용을 피하세요.

🌿 Urban Garden ‘Breeze’ — BBQ & 파이어핏

위치 & 구성
BBQ 장비는 1층 Urban Garden ‘Breeze’ 앞 데크(웨버 케틀 옆)에 비치되어 있습니다.구성: 웨버 케틀 57 cm × 2, 숯, 착화제, 토치, 장갑 & 도구 세트
파이어핏은 아래 정원에 있습니다. 점화도구·장갑은 파이어핏 옆 수납박스에 비치.장작 1세트 기본 비치(스타터 번들)

이용요금
BBQ: 케틀 1대 ₩30,000 / 2대 ₩60,000
파이어핏: ₩30,000(장작 1세트 포함)추가 장작: ₩20,000(사전 요청)

사계절 BBQ 팁사계절 BBQ 이용 가능합니다.

여름 팁숲과 맞닿은 가든입니다 🌳 — 제공되는 모기기피제를 뿌리고 나가세요.

겨울 팁

BBQ 테이블 상부에 강력한 원적외선 천장 히터가 설치되어 있습니다.
컨트롤 패널은 현관을 들어와 거실 오른편 벽면에 있습니다.

전원 🔛 : 전원 버튼을 눌러 켭니다.온도 🌡 : 온도 레벨을 10 (최강) 으로 맞춰주세요.종료 ⛔ : 사용 후에는 반드시 전원 버튼을 다시 눌러 전원을 꺼주세요.
⚠ 주의 이 히터는 고열량 전기기기입니다. 오래 켜 두면 과전압으로 숙소 전체 전원이 차단될 수 있습니다. 사용이 끝나면 바로 OFF 해 주세요.

안전소화기가 파이어핏 바로 옆에 비치되어 있습니다.

🔇 소음 & 야외 이용 규칙
20시 이후 BBQ 구역 정숙 유지
불꽃놀이·노출 화기 금지
야간 실내 대화가 크면 창문을 닫아 소음 최소화

🚬 흡연
지정 야외 구역만 가능, 재떨이 사용

🛒 BBQ 그로서리 & 배달
₩30,000 이상 주문 시 오토바이 무료 배송(매우 빠름)

럭키 할인 마트 — 서울 종로구 평창동 323-4 NAVER Map: https://naver.me/xiww0hKr

GS 더 프레시(종로구 포인트) — 서울 종로구 구기동 94 NAVER Map: https://naver.me/5pEsSqgJ

또는 컨시어지 팀에 요청하시면 쿠팡 앱 온라인 주문을 하루 전에 대행해드립니다.

📱 게스트 스마트폰 제공
한국 번호와 무제한 데이터·통화가 가능한 스마트폰 1대 무료 제공 필수 앱 사전 설치, 포켓 핫스팟(테더링) 가능

활용 예시 🍽️ 배달 주문 · 🚕 택시 호출 · 🌐 인터넷 · 🗺️ 길찾기
Local Tip 네이버지도를 열면 저희가 저장해 둔 로컬 가이드를 볼 수 있어요: 🍜 맛집 · 🏪 마트/편의점 · 🏥 병원/클리닉 · 💳 ATM/은행

🍽️ 음식 배달 간편 이용
게스트폰에서 쿠팡이츠 → 장바구니 담기 → WhatsApp으로 스크린샷 전송 저희 카드로 주문, 결제는 체크아웃 시 현금(또는 크립토) 정산

🚐 MPV 밴 택시
IM TAXI를 통해 7인승 MPV 밴 예약 가능 4–7인에 적합, 일반 택시 대비 약 30% 비쌈 2대 이상 필요 시 미리 요청해 주세요

🍳 주방 & 가전
식기세척기, 오븐, 정수기 구비

💧 정수기 (EVERPURE)
브랜드: EVERPURE(미국) — 스타벅스 공식 파트너
타입: 직수형 정수 시스템
관리: 매월 전문 관리
사용법: 싱크대 왼편 ‘정수기/Purified Water’ 라벨이 있는 작은 파우셋 사용
특징: 음용·조리에 적합한, 매우 안전하고 맛있는 물
집처럼 편하게 조리하세요!

☕ 캡슐 커피 & 티
illy 캡슐 커피 & 티 무료 이용 추가 캡슐은 전자레인지 하부 서랍에 보관

illy 머신 가이드 

Quick Start: https://youtu.be/XEDAXZY50FM?si=uOfwquZXC6WCis_G 

Steam Milk: https://youtu.be/bTzG7iM4dMA?si=aiEWUseiOT0as-Jo 

Volume Settings: https://youtu.be/h2X5gLYpf_4?si=eaDtARcyGQTjddFz

♻️ 음식물 & 일반 쓰레기
음식물(싱크 디스포저) 수도 켜기 → 풋 페달 밟기 → 음식물 분쇄 ⚠️ 뼈, 조개껍질, 과일 씨 등 단단한 물질 금지

일반 & 재활용 세탁실 쓰레기통 이용 + 분리배출 가득 차면 벽장 새 봉투로 교체, 현관 근처에 두고 메시지 주세요(수거해 드림)

📺 스마트 TV & 스트리밍
거실 TV는 Google TV 내장 한국 케이블, Netflix, Disney+, YouTube 이용 가능 로그인 도움 필요 시 메시지 주세요

🧴 타월 & 어메니티
타월 약 40장(페이스/바디/풋): 욕실 거울장 & 2F 드레스룸
호텔 어메니티(칫솔, 면도기 등): 2F 드레스룸

👶 베이비 스테이 킷
1F 마스터룸 클로젯의 라벨된 서랍에: 아기침대, 하이체어, 베이비모니터, 변기 보조좌, 젖병 소독기

🔥 난방 팁
본 주택은 온도조절기 1세트 공유(층별 체감차 가능)
1F: 23 °C 초과 설정 금지(주방 과열 방지)
마스터룸: 걸레받이 히터 약 25 °C 권장 추울/더울 경우 언제든 도와드릴게요

📩 문의
언제든 게스트 케어팀에 연락해 주세요!

📱 Guest Smartphone Provided

A smartphone with a Korean phone number and unlimited data & calls is provided free of charge during your stay!
Use it as a Wi-Fi hotspot and access all essential apps like Coupang Eats, KakaoTaxi, Naver Maps, and more.

💡 Local Tip:
Check out the Naver Map app — we’ve bookmarked great local spots like restaurants, supermarkets, banks, clinics, and more. It’s like having a local guide in your pocket! 🗺️📍

🍽️ Food Delivery Orders

Use the guest smartphone to open the Coupang Eats app.
Add your items to the cart, take a screenshot of the final summary, and send it to us via Messenger.
We’ll place the order and pay for it. You can reimburse us in cash or cryptocurrency at checkout.

🚖 MPV Taxi Booking

We can assist you with real-time bookings via IM TAXI.
MPV taxis seat up to 7 people — ideal for groups. Fares are approx. 30% higher than standard taxis.
Need multiple vans? No problem — just expect a short delay.

☕ Capsule Coffee & Tea

Extra tea and coffee capsules are in the closet under the water purifier. Feel free to help yourself!

illy Coffee Machine

Quick Guide
https://youtu.be/XEDAXZY50FM?si=uOfwquZXC6WCis_G

Steam Milk
https://youtu.be/bTzG7iM4dMA?si=aiEWUseiOT0as-Jo

Program the Volume
https://youtu.be/h2X5gLYpf_4?si=eaDtARcyGQTjddFz

♻️ Food Waste Disposal

A garbage disposal is built into the sink.
Turn on the water, press the foot pedal, and it will grind away food waste.
⚠️ No bones or shells, please!

🗑️ General & Recyclable Waste

Outside the main door, there are bins for general and recyclable waste.
Separate accordingly to help us keep the environment clean.

🍳 Kitchen Appliances

A dishwasher, air fryer, and kitchen gadgets are at your disposal.
Dishwasher detergent is under the sink.

📺 Multimedia

On the TV remote, select Google Chromecast to watch Netflix, Disney+, YouTube, etc.,
using the guest smartphone provided in the accommodation.

🧻 Supplies

Various tissues are stocked in the closet beside the main door.

🧴 Towels

Body, face, and foot towels are prepared in the closet under the TV.

🎁 Amenities Box

In the laundry room closet, you’ll find the amenity box.
Feel free to use anything you need!

🔥 Heating

Korean underfloor heating (ondol) is standard. Please do not turn it off completely,
as this also provides hot water for showers.

🚭 Smoking

Smoking is permitted in the garden.
Please use the ashtray provided on the table.

🅿️ Parking

You can park one car (under 2.2m in height, so not a Hyundai Staria) beside the main gate.
For more details, refer to our House Manual PDF.
If you have parking questions, let us know!

💬 Inquiries & Assistance

For any questions or concerns, feel free to contact us via this chat. Our team is ready to assist you promptly!

💬📱☕️

Enjoy your stay with COZE — we hope you have a fantastic time!

Hello Elisa! 😊

Welcome, and we're delighted to have you staying with us!

Since you'll be staying at our property for 6 nights, you're eligible for 2 complimentary airport van transfers.

Please send me your flight details (airline, flight number, arrival date, and arrival time), and I'll be happy to arrange your airport van reservation.

After you complete immigration and collect your luggage, simply head to the Arrival Hall, where our driver will be waiting for you holding a sign with your name.

We look forward to welcoming you to Korea and wish you a wonderful trip! 🇰🇷✨

Ricky, Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0

120363427141316994@g.us.text:
🏡 COZE GK Guest Guide
Gangnam Kelly Luxury – Units 402 & 403
Hello and welcome! 😊
Thank you for choosing COZE Hospitality 3.0.
We're delighted to have you stay with us. During your visit, you will be using both Unit 402 and Unit 403 of our COZE GK accommodation, conveniently located near Seolleung Station in Gangnam.
Please take a few minutes to read the information below before check-in. It will help ensure you have a comfortable and enjoyable stay.

📍 Address
Unit 402 & 403, Building A
45, Teheran-ro 55-gil, Gangnam-gu, Seoul
Google Maps may not recognize the new address accurately.
Please search using the old address instead:
695-17 Yeoksam-dong, Gangnam-gu, Seoul
📍 Google Maps
https://maps.app.goo.gl/RYJDiom6raBGDkjf7

🚗 Parking Information
Complimentary parking is available for one vehicle per reservation.
Parking is available for vehicles up to the size of a Hyundai Staria. Larger vehicles cannot be accommodated.
If you plan to park, please send your vehicle registration number to our Concierge Team in advance, as registration is required before arrival.

🔑 Parking Gate Remote Key
You may collect the parking gate remote key during check-in.
Location:
Parcel Locker No. 7 inside Building A Parking Garage.
Locker Password
✱2303✱
Please make sure to press the ✱ (star) button both before and after entering 2303.
After opening the locker, please take the parking gate remote from Unit 402.
Before checking out, please return the remote to its original location.

⚠️ Lost or damaged parking gate remotes may incur a replacement fee of KRW 300,000.

🔐 Building Entrance
To open the main building entrance, enter the following:
Enter 402
Press the Door button
Enter 2580
Press the Door button again
Although you are staying in both units, please always use Unit 402 for the building entrance system.

🚪 Apartment Door Password
Both Unit 402 and Unit 403 use the same door password.
Please unlock the door in the following order:
Enter the two random numbers displayed on the keypad
Enter your check-in date (YYMMDD) followed by ✱
Example
If your check-in date is June 21, 2026, enter:
260621✱
The first two numbers displayed on the screen are random security numbers and must be entered first.

📶 Wi-Fi
Unit 402
Network: DLive5G_3214
Password: BD09AF3213
Unit 403
Network: DLive5G_E065
Password: BD09AEE064

🔇 House Rules
Our accommodation is located in a residential building, so being considerate of our neighbors is extremely important.
Please help us by following these simple rules:
Keep TV, music, conversations, and door noise to a minimum after 9:00 PM.
Please remain especially quiet in the hallways and elevators.
Parties, excessive drinking, and loud gatherings are strictly prohibited.
Noise complaints may affect our ability to continue hosting guests in this building, so we sincerely appreciate your cooperation.

🚭 No Smoking
Smoking is strictly prohibited throughout the property.
This includes:
Inside the apartment
Bathrooms
Hallways
Staircases
All shared/common areas
Smoking inside the property may result in additional cleaning fees and penalties.

🕹️ Apartment Facilities
The motorized blinds and air-conditioning/heating system are controlled by the wall-mounted touch remotes.
Please tap the buttons gently rather than pressing them firmly, as they are touch-sensitive.
Before leaving the apartment, please switch off:
Air conditioning/heating
Lights
Electrical appliances

🏋️ Fitness Center & Residents' Lounge
The Fitness Center and Lounge are located on B1 (Basement Level 1).

Operating Hours 
08:00 – 22:00

Please note that the fitness center lights automatically turn off at 10:00 PM.
Before using these facilities, please contact our Concierge Team first.
We need to notify the building management in advance so you can access the facilities smoothly.
After use, please switch off the lights and air-conditioning and leave the space tidy for the next guests.

🌇 Rooftop

Operating Hours
08:00 – 20:00

The rooftop is designed as a quiet relaxation area.
Please:
Keep conversations quiet
Do not play music
Avoid loud noise
For everyone's safety, the following are strictly prohibited:
BBQs
Portable stoves
Candles
Fireworks
Smoking
Any open flames
Please be especially mindful during the evening, as sound travels easily.

💧 Drinking Water
The apartment water purifier is currently unavailable.
Instead, we have prepared five complimentary bottles of drinking water for your arrival.
If you need additional bottled water, simply contact our Concierge Team and we'll be happy to provide more.

🍳 Kitchen
You are welcome to use the kitchen and all cooking utensils.
After cooking:
Please clean up after yourself.
Help reduce lingering food odors by opening the windows for ventilation.
Before leaving the apartment, please double-check that:
Appliances are turned off
Air conditioning/heating is switched off
Lights are turned off

🗑 Waste Disposal & Recycling
Please separate your waste into the following categories.
🍽 Food Waste
Please use the yellow food waste bag.
Tie the bag securely and place it inside the food waste bin with the orange lid.

🗑 General Waste
Please use the white general waste bag.
When checking out, tie the bag securely and leave it outside the apartment, rather than inside the trash bin.
Our staff will collect it.

♻️ Recycling
Please separate recyclable items such as:
Plastic
Paper
Vinyl
Cans
Before checking out, place all recyclables in the recycling area outside your apartment entrance.
To avoid complaints from residents, please do not dispose of waste directly in the apartment complex's outdoor garbage area.

🧻 Towels & Amenities
Fresh towels, toilet paper, and basic amenities are provided inside the apartment storage cabinets.
If you need anything else during your stay, simply contact our Concierge Team.
We'll do our best to assist you as quickly as possible.

💬 Need Assistance?
If you have any questions or need help at any time during your stay, please don't hesitate to contact our Concierge Team.
We hope you enjoy a relaxing stay in the heart of Gangnam—combining the comfort of a hotel with the warmth of home.
Have a wonderful stay in Seoul! 🌿

COZE Hospitality 3.0
All You Need. All-in-One. All for You.

🌿 Horizon Spa ‘SUNRISE’ (ROOFTOP) — 먼저 읽어주세요

⚠️ 안전한 사용은 게스트의 책임입니다.

🔥 핀란드 사우나 — 사용 방법

게스트 스마트폰으로
Diooist 앱을 엽니다.
Power ON을 탭합니다.
우측 하단 컨트롤 버튼을 탭합니다.
목표 온도와 가동 시간을 설정합니다.권장 온도: 어린이 60 °C · 성인 90 °C

사우나 좌측 컨트롤 패널로
Power ON 버튼을 누릅니다.
우측 상단 Settings를 탭합니다.
Target에서 온도와 시간을 입력합니다.

에티켓 & 안전 수칙
예열 1시간 이상(목표 80–90 °C).
타월 위에 앉거나 눕기; 땀은 여분 타월로 닦기.
충분한 수분 섭취; 음주/과식 금지.
1회 15분 이내; 라운드 사이 5–10분 쿨다운.
돌에는 라들 소량만 물을 끼얹기 — 과다 시 히터 손상.
어린이는 보호자 동반 필수, 60–70 °C, 5분 이내.
수면 금지; 안전을 위해 문을 잠그지 말고 살짝 열어두세요.
종료 후 히터 전원 OFF, 문을 살짝 열어 건조.

썬베드 & 온열담요
호라이즌 스파 썬베드에 전기 온열담요 2조가 제공됩니다.
한겨울에도 따뜻하게 스파를 즐길 수 있으며, 담요는 젖지 않게 사용하고 사용 후 전원 OFF해 주세요.

🛀 자쿠지 — 안전 안내
먼저 샤워하여 수질 유지.
성인 최대 4명(또는 아동 6명).
1회 약 20분 이내, 세션 간 휴식.
로션/오일 금지.
아동·노약자 상시 감독; 해당 인원은 수온 38 °C 이하 유지.
임신 중, 졸림 유발 약 복용, 심장 질환이 있으면 이용을 피하세요.

🌿 Urban Garden ‘Breeze’ — BBQ & 파이어핏

위치 & 구성
BBQ 장비는 1층 Urban Garden ‘Breeze’ 앞 데크(웨버 케틀 옆)에 비치되어 있습니다.구성: 웨버 케틀 57 cm × 2, 숯, 착화제, 토치, 장갑 & 도구 세트
파이어핏은 아래 정원에 있습니다. 점화도구·장갑은 파이어핏 옆 수납박스에 비치.장작 1세트 기본 비치(스타터 번들)

이용요금
BBQ: 케틀 1대 ₩30,000 / 2대 ₩60,000
파이어핏: ₩30,000(장작 1세트 포함)추가 장작: ₩20,000(사전 요청)

사계절 BBQ 팁사계절 BBQ 이용 가능합니다.

여름 팁숲과 맞닿은 가든입니다 🌳 — 제공되는 모기기피제를 뿌리고 나가세요.

겨울 팁

BBQ 테이블 상부에 강력한 원적외선 천장 히터가 설치되어 있습니다.
컨트롤 패널은 현관을 들어와 거실 오른편 벽면에 있습니다.

전원 🔛 : 전원 버튼을 눌러 켭니다.온도 🌡 : 온도 레벨을 10 (최강) 으로 맞춰주세요.종료 ⛔ : 사용 후에는 반드시 전원 버튼을 다시 눌러 전원을 꺼주세요.
⚠ 주의 이 히터는 고열량 전기기기입니다. 오래 켜 두면 과전압으로 숙소 전체 전원이 차단될 수 있습니다. 사용이 끝나면 바로 OFF 해 주세요.

안전소화기가 파이어핏 바로 옆에 비치되어 있습니다.

🔇 소음 & 야외 이용 규칙
20시 이후 BBQ 구역 정숙 유지
불꽃놀이·노출 화기 금지
야간 실내 대화가 크면 창문을 닫아 소음 최소화

🚬 흡연
지정 야외 구역만 가능, 재떨이 사용

🛒 BBQ 그로서리 & 배달
₩30,000 이상 주문 시 오토바이 무료 배송(매우 빠름)

럭키 할인 마트 — 서울 종로구 평창동 323-4 NAVER Map: https://naver.me/xiww0hKr

또는 컨시어지 팀에 요청하시면 쿠팡 앱 온라인 주문을 하루 전에 대행해드립니다.

📱 게스트 스마트폰 제공
한국 번호와 무제한 데이터·통화가 가능한 스마트폰 1대 무료 제공 필수 앱 사전 설치, 포켓 핫스팟(테더링) 가능

활용 예시 🍽️ 배달 주문 · 🚕 택시 호출 · 🌐 인터넷 · 🗺️ 길찾기
Local Tip 네이버지도를 열면 저희가 저장해 둔 로컬 가이드를 볼 수 있어요: 🍜 맛집 · 🏪 마트/편의점 · 🏥 병원/클리닉 · 💳 ATM/은행

🍽️ 음식 배달 간편 이용
게스트폰에서 쿠팡이츠 → 장바구니 담기 → WhatsApp으로 스크린샷 전송 저희 카드로 주문, 결제는 체크아웃 시 현금(또는 크립토) 정산

🚐 MPV 밴 택시
IM TAXI를 통해 7인승 MPV 밴 예약 가능 4–7인에 적합, 일반 택시 대비 약 30% 비쌈 2대 이상 필요 시 미리 요청해 주세요

🍳 주방 & 가전
식기세척기, 오븐, 정수기 구비

💧 정수기 (EVERPURE)
브랜드: EVERPURE(미국) — 스타벅스 공식 파트너
타입: 직수형 정수 시스템
관리: 매월 전문 관리
사용법: 싱크대 왼편 ‘정수기/Purified Water’ 라벨이 있는 작은 파우셋 사용
특징: 음용·조리에 적합한, 매우 안전하고 맛있는 물
집처럼 편하게 조리하세요!

☕ 캡슐 커피 & 티
illy 캡슐 커피 & 티 무료 이용 추가 캡슐은 전자레인지 하부 서랍에 보관

illy 머신 가이드 

Quick Start: https://youtu.be/XEDAXZY50FM?si=uOfwquZXC6WCis_G 

Steam Milk: https://youtu.be/bTzG7iM4dMA?si=aiEWUseiOT0as-Jo 

Volume Settings: https://youtu.be/h2X5gLYpf_4?si=eaDtARcyGQTjddFz

♻️ 음식물 & 일반 쓰레기
음식물(싱크 디스포저) 수도 켜기 → 풋 페달 밟기 → 음식물 분쇄 ⚠️ 뼈, 조개껍질, 과일 씨 등 단단한 물질 금지

일반 & 재활용 세탁실 쓰레기통 이용 + 분리배출 가득 차면 벽장 새 봉투로 교체, 현관 근처에 두고 메시지 주세요(수거해 드림)

📺 스마트 TV & 스트리밍
거실 TV는 Google TV 내장 한국 케이블, Netflix, Disney+, YouTube 이용 가능 로그인 도움 필요 시 메시지 주세요

🧴 타월 & 어메니티
타월 약 40장(페이스/바디/풋): 욕실 거울장 & 2F 드레스룸

🏠 LOTUS 09 Guest Manual


📌 Essential Information

Address — 서울 마포구 성미산로23길 16-5  
16-5, Seongmisan-ro 23-gil, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea

Your Suite Door Code — Check‑in date in the format YYMMDD + *
Example: 10 May 2025 → 250510* (remains the same throughout your stay)

Wi‑Fi Networks

SSID  KT_GiGA_C346 
PIN    dck93gg797  


📱 Guest Smartphone Provided
A smartphone with a Korean phone number and unlimited data & calls is provided free of charge during your stay!
All essential apps are pre-installed, and the phone can be used as a portable Wi-Fi hotspot.

Use it to:
🍽️ Order food
🚕 Call taxis
🌐 Browse the internet
🗺️ Navigate the neighborhood

💡 Local Tip:
Open the Naver Map app — we’ve bookmarked a detailed local guide with:
🍜 Hidden gem restaurants
🏪 Supermarkets & convenience stores
🏥 Hospitals & clinics
💳 ATMs & banks

It’s like having a local guide in your pocket 📍😉

🍽️ Food Delivery
Order food via Coupang Eats using the guest smartphone. Once your cart is ready, screenshot the final page and send it to us via Messenger. We’ll handle the order and payment. Pay us in cash or crypto at checkout.

🚐 MPV Taxi Service
We assist with real-time bookings via IM TAXI. MPVs fit up to 7 people and cost ~30% more than regular cabs — but super comfy! Multiple MPV bookings may take extra time.


🍳 Kitchen Appliances

A full kitchen includes: dishwasher, oven, water purifier.

💧 Water Purifier (EVERPURE)
Brand: EVERPURE (USA) — Starbucks official partner

Type: Direct-flow purified water system

Maintenance: Professionally serviced monthly

How to use: Use the small faucet on the left side of the sink labeled “정수기 / Purified Water.”

Benefit: Very safe, great-tasting water for drinking & cooking

Feel free to cook like home!

☕ Capsule Coffee & Tea
Extra tea and coffee capsules are in the drawer beside the induction stove.
illy Coffee Machine Guide:

Quick Start: https://youtu.be/XEDAXZY50FM?si=uOfwquZXC6WCis_G

Steam Milk: https://youtu.be/bTzG7iM4dMA?si=aiEWUseiOT0as-Jo

Volume Settings: https://youtu.be/h2X5gLYpf_4?si=eaDtARcyGQTjddFz


♻️ Food Waste Disposal
Use the sink disposer — run water and step on the foot pedal.

🗑️ Trash & Recycling
At the front door, you’ll find a trash bin. Separate general/recycling waste. If it’s full, let us know — we’ll take care of it. Ask us about Korean waste rules anytime!

🧴 Amenities & Towels
~20 towel sets (face, body, foot) in the bathroom.
Toilet paper: last shoe cabinet compartment.
Hotel amenities: cabinet next to the fridge.

🔒 Privacy & Blinds
Day: Reflective film = full privacy with open blinds.
Night: Please close blinds to block outside view.

💨 Ventilation System
2 heat-exchange ventilators keep air fresh — even with windows closed.

🔥 Heating System
Living room & main bedroom = ceiling-mounted A/C heater.
Other rooms = radiator heating.

💧 Humidity Control
Heating can cause dryness!
The air purifiers (living room + master bedroom) include humidifiers. Please refill with water daily using the watering can provided.

🚭 Smoking
Smoking is allowed on the terrace. Use the ashtray on the table.

🅿️ Parking
No on-site parking (Yeonnam-dong). See the Check-in Manual (PDF) for alternatives. Inform us in advance if using paid lots — hourly rates apply without a reservation.

💬 Inquiries & Assistance
Questions? Message us on Messenger anytime. We’re one tap away and happy to help!
💬📱☕️
We hope you enjoy your stay with COZE — your home in Seoul!

Hello 

Welcome, and we're delighted to have you staying with us!

Since you'll be staying at our property for 6 nights, you're eligible for 2 complimentary airport van transfers.

Please send me your flight details (airline, flight number, arrival date, and arrival time), and I'll be happy to arrange your airport van reservation.

After you complete immigration and collect your luggage, simply head to the Arrival Hall, where our driver will be waiting for you holding a sign with your name.

We look forward to welcoming you to Korea and wish you a wonderful trip! 🇰🇷✨

Ricky, Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0

*COZE SJ – STAY MANUAL*

 The Serviced Apartment Near Seoul Station Where Hotel Convenience Meets the Comfort of Home 🏡

 Welcome to your snug hideaway steps from Seoul Station!

 Kick off your shoes, relax, and let this warm-yet-witty guide show you how to keep our place peaceful, spotless, and altogether delightful.


📌 Essential Information

Address — 

서울시 중구 칠패로 27 순화더샵아파트 B동 1207호

 #1207, APT B, Sunwha The Sharp APT
27, Chilpae-ro, Jung-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea 04511

Main Gate Pin     # 8 0 2 2

Your Suite Door Code — 

Check‑in date in the format YYMMDD + *

Example: 10 May 2025 → 250510* (remains the same throughout your stay)

Wi‑Fi Networks

SSID  JOYHASLA_SJ
PIN    joyjoyjoysj

🏠 House Rules

🏞️ A Peaceful, Respectful Neighborhood

Our building prides itself on peace and quiet.

Absolutely no loud gatherings or shouting in the hallway—treat it like a museum corridor, not a karaoke lounge.


🚪 Hallway Conduct

The hallway is a shared space. While we love a friendly “hello,” please keep voices low.

Do not leave suitcases, boxes, or personal items in the hallway—even for a minute. It blocks the path and disturbs neighbors.

Breaking these rules can lead to immediate penalties (nobody wants that).


🚭 No Smoking Indoors

This is a strictly non-smoking home.

Lighting up indoors triggers a five-thousand-dollar fee for deep cleaning.

Smoke detectors stand guard in every room (including bathrooms).


🔇 Quiet Hours

From around eight in the evening, keep noise to a minimum.

If neighbors complain about noise (music, rowdy chatter, door-slamming), your security deposit may disappear—no questions asked.

Windows and doors should stay closed if you’re gaming, watching TV, or enjoying a private dance party.


🪑 Furniture Placement

Keep large furniture where it’s meant to be unless you’ve checked with us.

Smaller items? Sure, move them if needed—just put them back before checkout.


👶 Children

Littles of all ages are very welcome.

Remember to include them in your total guest count.


👥 Registered Guests Only

To maintain safety and fairness, only registered guests may stay overnight.

Surprise visitors or unregistered individuals can result in added fees or reservation cancellation.

We have an external camera at the entrance to ensure everyone’s security.


🏡 Making Yourself at Home


📱 Guest Smartphone Provided

A smartphone with a Korean number and unlimited data & calls is provided free of charge during your stay!

Use it to:

🍽️ order food
🚕 call taxis
🌐 browse the web
🗺️ navigate the neighborhood

Local Tip — Open the Naver Map app and check our bookmarks for:


🍜 hidden‑gem restaurants
 
🏪 convenience stores
 
🏥 clinics

💳 ATMs.

It’s like having a local guide in your pocket 📍😉

🍽️ Food Delivery Made Easy

On the guest phone, open Coupang Eats.
Add items to your cart.
Screenshot the cart and send it to us via WhatsApp.
We’ll place the order on our card; pay us later in cash or crypto at checkout.

🚐 Need an MPV Van Taxi?

Seats up to 7 passengers; fares ≈ 30 % higher than regular cabs.
Let us know early if you need multiple vans or have heavy luggage.

🍳 Kitchen & Appliances

A full kitchen includes: dishwasher, oven, water purifier.

💧 Water Purifier (EVERPURE)
Brand: EVERPURE (USA) — Starbucks official partner

Type: Direct-flow purified water system

Maintenance: Professionally serviced monthly

How to use: Use the small faucet on the left side of the sink labeled “정수기 / Purified Water.”

Benefit: Very safe, great-tasting water for drinking & cooking

Feel free to cook like home! 

☕ illy Coffee Machine

Capsules are in the drawer under the coffee maker (or above the microwave). Enjoy anytime!

Need a quick tutorial? Check these links:

Quick Start: https://youtu.be/XEDAXZY50FM?si=uOfwquZXC6WCis_G

Steam Milk: https://youtu.be/bTzG7iM4dMA?si=aiEWUseiOT0as-Jo

Volume Settings: https://youtu.be/h2X5gLYpf_4?si=eaDtARcyGQTjddFz



♻️ Food Disposal

Turn on water, press the pedal—watch scraps swirl away.

No bones or shells, please!


📺 TV Streaming

Switch to Chromecast on the TV.

Stream Netflix, Disney Plus, or your favorite cat videos using the guest phone.


🧻 Supplies & Towels

Tissues near the main door.

Towels (face, body, foot) in the mirror closet, laundry nook, or dressing space.


🎁 Amenities Box

Inside the staff closet in the dressing room, you’ll find extra goodies—use whatever you need.



---

😊 Thanks for Reading

By following these guidelines—especially around hallway conduct and quiet hours—you’ll help ensure a calm, pleasant stay for everyone. If you have questions, don’t hesitate to ask!

Enjoy your time at COZE SJ Tailored Service Apartment near Seoul Station. We’re here to make your stay comfortable, relaxing, and hassle-free!
